title: Instruction-edit model catalog
description: Catalog of instruction-edit pipeline configs keyed by model ID. Loaded at module import by images/ai_enhance.py via local_ai_platform.registries.load_instruct_models. Today's IDs: kontext, nunchaku, cosxl. Adding a model = JSON edit + module re-import + a corresponding loader/inference branch in ai_enhance.py + a Flutter chip update (see images/CLAUDE.md 'Adding a new instruct-edit model').

name.description: Human-friendly label shown in the Flutter editor model picker.

description.description: Prose summary shown alongside the name in the picker.

default_guidance.description: Guidance scale default (CFG) for this pipeline. Typical 2.5 (FLUX) or 7.0 (SDXL).

default_image_guidance.description: SDXL-only: image guidance scale (separate from prompt guidance). Optional — only SDXL-based pipelines like cosxl use it.
